zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Marjorie de Waleton於1230年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特霍爾福德時，她的父親John de Waleton-30歲，母親Matilda Waleton-32歲。她和Thomas de Norley至少有1個女兒。她去世於1326年在英國爾諾利享年96歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Waleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name perhaps from Walsden (Yorkshire, formerly in Lancashire). The placename may derive from an Old English personal name Walsa, Wæls, or Walh (genitive Wales) + Old English denu ‘valley’.
Scottish: habitational name from Walston Lanarkshire. The placename is from Scots wall ‘well’, with a connecting or perhaps plural -s-, + toun ‘farm, village’.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

nameMeanings.name: Marjorie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

variants.name: Marjory
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Marjorie de Waleton was born in 1230, in Holford, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Waleton, was -30 and her mother, Matilda Waleton, was -32. She had at least 1 daughter with Thomas de Norley. She died in 1326, in Norley, Cheshire, England, at the age of 96.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Marjorie de Waleton est née en 1230, à Holford, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Waleton, avait -30 ans et sa mère, Matilda Waleton, avait -32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Thomas de Norley. Elle est décédée en 1326, à Norley, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 96 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Marjorie de Waleton 1230 in Holford, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Waleton -30 und ihre Mutter Matilda Waleton -32. Sie hatte mit Thomas de Norley mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1326 im Alter von 96 Jahren in Norley, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Marjorie de Waleton è nata il nel 1230 nel Holford, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Waleton, aveva -30 anni e sua madre, Matilda Waleton, aveva -32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Thomas de Norley. Morì nel 1326, nel Norley, Cheshire, England, all'età di 96 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Marjorie de Waleton(이)가 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 홀퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Waleton(은)는 -30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Waleton(은)는 -32세였다. 그녀는 Thomas de Norley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1326년 영국 체실르 노를리에서 96세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Marjorie de Waleton родилась в 1230 г. в местности холфорд, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Waleton было -30 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Waleton, -32. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Thomas de Norley. Она умерла в 1326 г. в местности норли, чешир, Англия в возрасте 96 лет.
